protected_core.task_goal: Keep controller queue semantics, checkpoint semantics, report truth, and dispatch truth aligned so Main stops only on trusted terminal states.
protected_core.expected_output: Contract-valid checkpoint truth plus aligned control docs for queue finalization and terminal-state persistence.
protected_core.current_step: Persist queue snapshot and terminal-state truth into the checkpoint contract and runtime closeout path.
protected_core.resume_point: If `Controlled Flag-On Validation` is explicitly requested, activate it immediately. Otherwise remain at WAITING_APPROVAL until an explicit request or fresh exact blocker arrives.
hard_constraints: Only controller may emit final ABORT.
Missing evidence fails soft to HOLD or REVIEW, never ABORT.
Do not enable controller flags globally unless explicitly requested.
Do not reopen closed lanes without the required exact blocker packet.
business_invariants: Memphis-only 90 day PoC scope remains frozen.
Instinct8 runtime-hook capability stays additive and default-off.
Controlled flag-on validation is user-request gated.

compaction.halo_summary: Checkpoint truth now carries queue snapshot and terminal-state fields. Current state is WAITING_APPROVAL because only the explicit-request validation wave remains.
